Ref.: Certificate of Local Content for ACER Veriton X2240G 
This is to certify that proposed model of ACER Veriton X2240G is having the local content of 
above 50 % (Class-I) as defined in the above mentioned RFP. 
 
This certificate is submitted in reference to the Public Procurement (Preference to Make in India), Order 
2017 – Revision vide Order No. P-45021/2/2017-PP(BE-II), dated: 4th June, 2020.
